title: Dashboard Page
content:
This file defines the main dashboard page for the DocMed application.

## Purpose

The dashboard page serves as the landing screen for authenticated users, providing a welcome message and an indication that their workspace is ready.

## Key Exports

*   **`DashboardPage`**: A React functional component that renders the dashboard UI.

## Usage Example

This component is likely rendered at the `/dashboard` route of the application. It displays a welcoming message and a visual cue that the user's documentation workspace is prepared.

```tsx
// In your routing configuration or app entry point:
import DashboardPage from './app/dashboard/page';

// ... render DashboardPage component when navigating to '/dashboard'
```
